_meta.name: zodiac-tarot-hubs-knowledge
_meta.purpose: Zodiac 5 + Tarot 2 概念 hub 页（聚合现有主词页/融合页，概念入口）
_meta.evidence_tier: 西方占星+塔罗公开通识(确证)
_meta.note: hub post（根级概念页），不是 category archive；内链现有 12 星座主词页 + 22 塔罗融合页

mainpages.title: Zodiac Signs: Complete Guide to All 12 Signs
mainpages.definition: The zodiac is a belt of 12 constellations through which the Sun travels over a year. Each sign covers roughly 30 degrees and carries distinct element, quality, and symbolic traits.
faq_seeds: How do I find my zodiac sign?
What do elements mean in zodiac?
mainpages.eastern_note: Parallel Eastern: 七曜 (Sun/Moon + 5 planets) mapped to 火水木金土曜; Eastern-inspired brand frames Western astrology as parallel not exclusive

mainpages.title: Zodiac Compatibility: Which Signs Match?
mainpages.definition: Zodiac compatibility assesses how two signs interact based on element (same element = harmony, complementary = growth, clashing = challenge). 78 unique sign pairs exist.

steps: Clashing elements (Fire+Water, Earth+Air): challenge and learning

faq_seeds: Which zodiac signs are most compatible?
mainpages.eastern_note: Parallel Eastern reference only; compatibility is symbolic not deterministic

mainpages.title: Zodiac Elements: Fire, Earth, Air, Water Explained
mainpages.definition: The four zodiac elements (Fire, Earth, Air, Water) group the 12 signs into fundamental temperaments. Fire = passion/action, Earth = stability/materiality, Air = intellect/communication, Water = emotion/intuition.

steps: Fire (Aries, Leo, Sagittarius): energetic, passionate, pioneering
Earth (Taurus, Virgo, Capricorn): grounded, practical, reliable
Air (Gemini, Libra, Aquarius): intellectual, social, communicative
Water (Cancer, Scorpio, Pisces): emotional, intuitive, nurturing

faq_seeds: What are the four zodiac elements?
mainpages.eastern_note: Parallel: Eastern 五行 (Five Elements: Wood/Fire/Earth/Metal/Water) is a different but related system; note distinction

mainpages.title: Zodiac Modalities: Cardinal, Fixed & Mutable Signs
mainpages.definition: Zodiac modalities (qualities) describe how each sign expresses energy. Cardinal = initiates, Fixed = stabilizes, Mutable = adapts. Each modality has 4 signs across elements.

steps: Cardinal (Aries, Cancer, Libra, Capricorn): initiators, starters
Fixed (Taurus, Leo, Scorpio, Aquarius): stabilizers, preservers
Mutable (Gemini, Virgo, Sagittarius, Pisces): adapters, flexible

mainpages.eastern_note: Parallel reference; modalities are Western astrological framework

mainpages.title: Zodiac Signs Dates: Complete 12-Sign Calendar
mainpages.definition: Zodiac sign dates are determined by the Sun's position. Each sign spans approximately 30 days. Western tropical zodiac uses fixed seasonal dates.
faq_seeds: What are the zodiac sign dates?
How do I know my zodiac sign by birthday?

mainpages.title: Tarot Card Meanings: Complete Guide to All 78 Cards
mainpages.definition: Tarot is a symbolic system of 78 cards: 22 Major Arcana (life's big themes) and 56 Minor Arcana (daily life). Each card carries upright and reversed meanings.

steps: Major Arcana (22): Fool through World — life themes and spiritual journey
Each card has upright (positive) and reversed (shadow) meanings

faq_seeds: How many tarot cards are there?
How do I learn tarot meanings?
mainpages.eastern_note: Tarot is Western esoteric tradition; Eastern-inspired brand frames as symbolic reflection tool

mainpages.title: Major Arcana Meanings: The 22 Trump Cards Explained
mainpages.definition: The 22 Major Arcana cards represent major life themes and the Fool's Journey (a narrative of spiritual growth from card 0 The Fool to card 21 The World).

steps: Each card = a stage in the Fool's Journey of growth

faq_seeds: What are the Major Arcana cards?
How many Major Arcana are there?
mainpages.eastern_note: Western esoteric tradition; frame as symbolic reflection, not fortune-telling
